classes.title: Knight Talents
classes.description: Disciplined frontline swordmasters who protect allies, control space, and punish reckless enemies.

nodes.description: Passive - Your third consecutive sword strike on the same target rips open their defenses, dealing 30% bonus weapon damage.

Active - Thrust forward instantly, piercing your target for 125% weapon damage. If the target has no allies within 5 yards, this counts as an Isolated Strike and deals an additional 25% damage. (30s CD)
Passive - Perfectly executing a parry or sidestep empowers your sword within 4 seconds, granting your next ability 20% increased Critical Chance and 15% armor penetration.
Passive - Blocking or parrying an attack places a visible Duelist Mark on the attacker for 5 seconds. Marked enemies deal 10% less damage to your allies.

Active - Bash an enemy for 90% weapon damage, interrupting action casting and forcing their lock-on camera to face you for 3 seconds. Camera movement friction is heavily scaled so opponents cannot easily pan or aim away from you for the duration. (30s CD)
Passive - While above 50% stamina, your block stability increases by 15% and you are immune to minor stagger effects.
Passive - Plant a rallying aura around yourself. Allies within 10 yards gain 8% movement speed when pushing toward enemies and 10% faster active stamina recovery.
Active - Cleave targets for 110% weapon damage, raising your blade to inspire nearby allies with 15% bonus attack speed for 6 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Hitting an enemy with any active sword skill sounds a battle echo, boosting the total damage output of all surrounding allies by 5% for 5 seconds (Refreshes duration, does not stack).

Passive - Committing your blade to a single enemy grants a stacking focus buff every 2 seconds. Each stack increases your melee damage by 5% (up to 3 stacks max). Switching your lock-on target drops all stacks instantly.
Active - Unleash two lightning scissor-slashes for 80% weapon damage each. If both strikes connect, the second strike is a guaranteed Critical Hit. (45s CD)
Passive - A successful parry instantly resets your basic attack swing timer, allowing a lightning-fast counter-attack that inflicts 50% bonus weapon damage and reduces their physical power by 10%.
Passive - While your health is above 50%, your presence creates a golden aura radius. Allies within this 8-yard perimeter gain a permanent 10% armor increase.
Active - Plant your feet and brace your shield for 4 seconds, gaining 30% damage reduction. Enemies who strike you with melee attacks are physically slowed by 30% for 2 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - When an attack breaks your guard or bypasses your active block, your next basic strike within 5 seconds triggers a Riposte that restores 5% max health and deals 20% bonus damage.

Passive - Whenever you are hit by a crowd-control effect, you emit an immediate aura burst that purges or reduces current crowd-control duration on your allies by 15%. This effect mirrors back to you if an ally is CC'd.
Active - Shout a battle cry that hardens your team, granting all allies within earshot a 10% damage reduction shield and a 10% damage output buff for 6 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Continuous forward sprinting or charging builds a kinetic Momentum bar. At 100% capacity, your next active command or offensive ability gains 20% amplified effect strength.

Active - A high-commitment overhead execution strike dealing 210% weapon damage. Scaled execution damage increases dynamically by up to 40% based on how low the target's current health bar is. (90s CD)
Passive - Damaging an opponent whose health is below 35% sends you into a state of hyper-focus, granting 15% increased attack speed and 15% stamina regeneration for 5 seconds.

Active - Skill-shot dash forward. If hitting an ally: You leap in front of them, absorbing directional attacks for 3 seconds and granting them a Barrier equal to 15% of your max health. If hitting an enemy: Strike for 120% weapon damage and inflict a hard 1-second Stagger. (90s CD)

Passive - Once every 12 seconds, when a nearby ally within 8 yards suffers a Critical Hit, you buffer the defensive math, absorbing 50% of that damage instance directly through your own armor and shields.

Active - Consecrate a 10-yard glowing Command Zone on the ground for 6 seconds. All allies standing within the boundaries gain a 15% reduction to all stamina costs, and the first major crowd-control disable applied to them has its duration slashed by 50%. (90s CD)

Passive - You draw strength from numbers. For every ally standing within your 10-yard command zone, you gain 4% personal damage reduction (caps out at a maximum of 12%). At max stacks, your cooldowns tick down 15% faster.

Active - Challenge your target to a duel state for 10 seconds. Your sword attacks completely bypass 25% of their armor, successful parries completely reset the remaining cooldown of your Lunge of Judgment, and every third strike triggers an echoes-blade slash for 70% cleave damage. Leaving the target's immediate zone for more than 3 seconds breaks the spell state early. (200s CD)

Active - Erect a massive protective wall aura for 8 seconds. You cannot be guard-broken by [F] keys, your block stamina drain is reduced to 0, and 40% of all incoming damage entering the aura space is redirected to you. Instantly scales an Overlap Cap: The maximum damage redirected cannot exceed 100% of your maximum base health pool, and the concluding burst heals you for 100% of unmitigated damage taken capped safely at 25% max health. (200s CD)

Active - Raise a massive glowing battle standard for 8 seconds. You and your allies gain 15% movement speed, 15% damage amplification, 20% stamina cost reduction, and complete immunity to all movement slows or cripples. Upon planting the banner, a shockwave rips out in a straight line dealing 160% weapon damage to all enemies caught in its path. (200s CD)

classes.title: Rogue Talents
classes.description: Predatory melee killers who control tempo through stealth, toxins, and execution windows.

nodes.description: Passive - Dagger strikes apply a virulent Venom toxin for 5 seconds, dealing 6% weapon damage per second. Stacks up to 3 times per target.

Active - Execute a driving stab for 100% weapon damage, instantly rupturing and consuming all active Venom stacks to deal 25% instant weapon damage per stack. If maximum stacks are consumed, the target's incoming healing is crippled by 20% for 5 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Landing a Critical Hit instantly forces one tick of all active poisons to detonate out of schedule and accelerates your movement speed by 10% for 2 seconds.
Passive - Your venom melts defenses. Each active stack of Venom on a target strips away 5% of their total physical armor (up to 15% max reduction).
Active - Slice across a vital artery for 130% weapon damage, exposing the target so they take 15% amplified direct melee damage from your follow-up attacks for 5 seconds. (45s CD)

Passive - Extends the maximum duration of your poisons by 25% by making them bond strongly with cellular structures. Striking an enemy who is sitting at max Venom stacks leeches life away, restoring 2% of your health pool per hit.

Active - Apply an unstable coat to your blades for 8 seconds. While active, every dagger hit injects a volatile compound. Reaching 3 Venom stacks causes this compound to violently combust, dealing 100% explosive weapon damage. (90s CD)
Passive - When a target falls beneath the 30% health threshold, your venomous enzymes catalyze, causing poison ticks to trigger 30% faster.

Active - Pierce a target for 180% weapon damage, injecting a biological plague that immediately applies max Venom stacks. If the target dies within 8 seconds, the infection bursts outward in a 6-yard radius, instantly infecting all surrounding enemies with max venom stacks and 60% weapon damage. If the virus runs its full duration without the target dying, it implodes inside them for 150% catastrophic damage. (200s CD)
Passive - Seamlessly chaining melee strikes together within 2 seconds grants a compounding 5% attack speed buff. Stacks up to 5 times. Missing a swing or disengaging resets the chain.
Active - Cross-slash your daggers for 120% weapon damage, inflicting a deep laceration bleed that ticks for 20% weapon damage over 4 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Striking an enemy who has a bleeding status effect instantly feeds 3% stamina back into your pool and increases your movement speed by 5% for 3 seconds.
Passive - Your blades seek open flesh. You deal 15% amplified melee damage against targets currently suffering from any bleed effect.

Active - Execute 3 rapid serrated strikes for 70% weapon damage each. If the target is bleeding, the final strike twists the blades to reset the bleed duration and amplifies that strike's damage by 25%. (45s CD)
Passive - Weaving basic attacks and active skills perfectly boosts your performance: Using an active ability within 3 seconds of a basic attack increases that ability's damage by 15%.

Active - Flash through an enemy target like a blur, slicing them for 150% weapon damage and seamlessly reappearing directly behind them. If the target is actively bleeding, this skill rewards your precision by slashing 6 seconds off the remaining cooldown of Sunder Slice. (90s CD)

Passive - Shredding the exact same target 5 times within a 5-second window completely cripples their movement speed by 30% for 2 seconds. This binding effect can only occur once every 8 seconds per target.

Active - Enter a 5-second state of pure slaughter. You instantly spin-strike all surrounding targets for 100% weapon damage, your attack speed skyrockets by 25%, basic attacks cleave all adjacent targets, and your hits automatically lock active bleeds to their maximum duration. Furthermore, Butcher's Rush costs 0 stamina and gains 2 immediate charges. (200s CD)
Passive - Entering the shadows grants you a visual smoke outline, boosting movement speed by 20% and compressing enemy detection ranges by 30%.
Active - Vanish completely into stealth for up to 6 seconds, accelerating your movement speed by 25%. Your first active attack terminates this stealth state. (30s CD)
Passive - Breaking stealth with an attack amplifies that initial strike's total damage by 25% and surges 10% stamina back into your resource pool.
Passive - Slipping out of stealth optimizes your combat flow, reducing the remaining cooldown of your next non-capstone class ability by 4 seconds.

Active - Teleport through the shadows to any target within 10 yards, seamlessly appearing directly behind their back and striking for 125% weapon damage. Accessible only while stealthed or within 2 seconds of breaking stealth. (45s CD)
Passive - Positioning is everything. Striking enemies from a 180-degree angle behind them bypasses 20% of their total armor defenses.

Active - Ambush your target from the shadows for 170% weapon damage, driving a hilt strike into their throat to Silence them for 2 seconds. Breaking stealth with this skill rewards you with an additional 20% Critical Chance. (90s CD)

Passive - When you suffer a Critical Hit, your body briefly destabilizes into smoke, granting 30% movement speed and a 20% damage evasion shield for 2 seconds. This evasion window can only trigger once every 16 seconds.

Active - For 8 seconds, you become a living shadow. Voidstep no longer requires stealth to cast, its operational cooldown is smashed down to 4 seconds, and every time you execute a Voidstep, your next basic strike shadow-echoes to hit twice. To ensure readability and counter-play in intensive arenas, Voidstep leaves behind a clear 0.25-second directional smoke trail trajectory pointing directly toward your destination backline prior to materialization. (200s CD)

classes.title: Dreadnought Talents
classes.description: Massive armored juggernauts who dominate through poise, impact, and unstoppable commitment.

nodes.description: Passive - Two-handed heavy weapon strikes deal 12% more damage and inflict massive Poise Damage, shattering enemy balance and leaving them wide open to hard staggers.
Active - Bring down a massive overhead swing for 150% weapon damage. If the target is already suffering from a stagger or slow, this strike hits with a 25% damage bonus. (30s CD)
Passive - Your fully committed heavy attacks physically crush armor plates on impact, melting the target's total armor value by 10% for 5 seconds.
Passive - Momentum builds momentum. Raining consecutive two-handed swings down on the same target builds a 5% damage amplification buff per swing (stacks up to 3 times, lasts 5 seconds).

Active - Slam your weapon down to split the earth in a straight line, dealing 170% weapon damage to the primary target and 80% cascading damage to anyone caught behind them. The primary target has their legs crippled, slowing them by 20% for 3 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Your massive swings possess incredible kinetic energy. All active heavy abilities send out a dirt-shattering shockwave on impact, dealing 25% weapon cleave damage to all surrounding foes.

Active - Wind up and release a devastating crushing smash for 210% weapon damage. This attack possesses 30% amplified stagger power, completely interrupting any action that isn't protected by full crowd-control immunity. (90s CD)
Passive - Your mastery of heavy weaponry is absolute. While wielding a two-handed weapon, your Critical Hits deal 20% amplified critical destruction damage and instantly refund 5% stamina.

Active - Unleash a catastrophic, ground-shattering swing in a wide 180-degree frontal arc, dealing 300% weapon damage and maximum Poise Damage. Regular enemies are physically launched backward; elite or boss-tier entities have their balance shattered into a heavy long-duration Stagger state. Your next Pulverize within 8 seconds activates instantly with 0 stamina cost. (200s CD)
Passive - Your absolute mass naturally reduces all incoming crowd-control duration states by 25%, and makes you highly resistant to Guard Breaks [F].

Active - Heavy weapon smash into the earth, fracturing the ground for 90% weapon damage in an area-of-effect circle. Crushed earth slows enemy movement by 30% for 3 seconds and generates maximum threat. (30s CD)
Passive - Convert weight into defense, gaining a flat 12% armor increase and becoming completely immune to minor environmental or combat knockbacks.
Passive - When your defenses are breached by an enemy Critical Hit, your armor hardens dynamically, granting a 15% damage reduction shield for 4 seconds (10s internal cooldown).
Active - Lock your armor plates and brace for 6 seconds. You shrug off 40% of all incoming damage and become a completely immovable wall, immune to all displacement, knockbacks, or pulls. (45s CD)
Passive - While moving at normal walking speeds or standing your ground (not dashing), your armor locking mechanism grants 10% flat damage reduction and a 15% boost to block stability.
Active - Emit a metallic roar that forces all surrounding enemies to lock onto you for 4 seconds, while granting you an immediate 20% damage reduction shell for the duration. (90s CD)

Passive - When your health bar drops below the critical 40% threshold, you enter an emergency preservation state: You can no longer be critically struck by enemies, and your incoming healing received climbs by 15%.

Active - For 8 seconds, become an avatar of iron. Gain 30% flat damage mitigation, achieve total immunity to displacement and skill interruptions, and reflect 25% of all direct kinetic melee strikes straight back at your attackers. Every individual swing that impacts your armor feeds 3% threat amplification and 3% stamina back to you, stacking infinitely during the window. (200s CD)
Passive - Breaking into a charge or a dash fills your engine with steam, boosting your follow-up damage output by 10% and your running speed by 10% for 4 seconds.
Active - Drop your shoulder and rocket forward in a straight line, plowing through all enemies for 110% weapon damage and pinning your primary target in place with a 1.5-second hard Root. (30s CD)
Passive - You form a kinetic prow during movement. You absorb 20% less damage while actively charging and for 1 full second after your charge momentum ends.
Passive - You shatter defensive lines. Any enemy physically struck by your active charges has their defensive posture broken, reducing their armor by 12% for 5 seconds.
Active - Stomp your heavy armored boot into the dirt, releasing a kinetic ring for 100% weapon damage that violently interrupts enemy casts and slows movement by 25% for 2 seconds. (45s CD)

Passive - Connecting a movement or charge skill with at least one enemy target re-establishes your energy loop, instantly venting 8% stamina back to you and subtracting 3 seconds off your next active skill's cooldown.

Active - Convert yourself into an unstoppable battering ram and surge forward with pure crowd-control immunity. Deal 160% weapon damage in a wide line, physically tossing lesser enemies out of your path and rattling their weapons to reduce their outgoing damage by 15% for 4 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Your movement generates kinetic defenses. Every dash or charge skill executed locks your armor plates to provide 6% bonus armor for 6 seconds (stacks up to 2 times).

Active - Overclock your steam engines for 8 seconds. Your charge and dash distances are extended by 50%, you gain absolute crowd-control immunity while in motion, and anyone run over by your charges takes 20% amplified damage from your follow-up attacks for 4 seconds. Activating this skill instantly grants a protective Barrier equal to 15% of your maximum health. (200s CD)

classes.title: Barbarian Talents
classes.description: Savage melee warriors who escalate through rage, risk, and blood-fueled momentum.

nodes.description: Passive - Your bloodlust is insatiable. Dealing direct physical melee damage accelerates your Rage generation by 15%.

Active - Execute a wild, driving cleave for 130% weapon damage and fuel your resource bar with 15 immediate Rage. If executed while above 50 Rage, gain a 12% movement speed sprint for 3 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Sitting at a high-intensity state above 50 Rage sharpens your reflexes, granting 10% bonus attack speed. If your health drops below 30%, this adrenaline frenzy is completely doubled to 20%.
Passive - Landing a Critical Hit feeds your fury, restoring 6 Rage and causing your next basic strike to strike with a 20% damage amplification multiplier.

Active - Let loose a bloodcurdling scream that fills you with primeval fury, granting 15% attack speed and 10% increased damage for 6 seconds. If chanted while your health is dangerously low (sub-50%), gain an additional 12% damage reduction shield. (45s CD)

Passive - Your rage grows with the size of the slaughter. Every enemy caught in your active skill sweeps grants you a compounding 4% damage amplification buff for 5 seconds (stacks up to 4 times max).
Active - Sprint forward like a maniac, crashing into your target for 150% weapon damage, physically throwing aside lesser entities and gathering 20 heavy Rage points on impact. (90s CD)
Passive - You welcome injuries. Sufferings from an incoming Critical Hit shocks your system, instantly rewarding you with 15 free Rage (8s internal cooldown).

Active - Enter a legendary 7-second blood frenzy. Instantly flood your resource pool with 30 Rage, your basic attacks slice so wildly that they cleave 2 additional nearby targets, and your overall attack speed climbs by 20%. Every single active strike generates bonus rage, and dropping below 30% health grants you a massive 15% Lifesteal aura until the Rampage concludes. (200s CD)
Passive - Your skin is thick and covered in battle scars. Gain a flat 10% increase to maximum health and a permanent 6% reduction to all incoming damage.
Active - Issue a booming challenge that draws the eye of all surrounding enemies for 4 seconds while wrapping your flesh in a 15% damage reduction shield for 6 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Burn away your fury to mend your flesh. Every time you expend 20 points of Rage, your body instantly regenerates 2% of its maximum health pool.

Passive - When your health bar dips below the 40% survival line, your survival instincts flare: Instantly gain 15 Rage and boost all incoming healing sources by 15% for 5 seconds (20s internal cooldown).

Active - Adopt a menacing defensive stance for 5 seconds. You reflect 30% of all incoming direct melee damage right back into the flesh of your attackers while boosting your block/parry resilience by 20%. (45s CD)
Passive - Being struck by an enemy in melee combat fills you with spite. Your next basic counter-strike within 4 seconds deals 25% amplified damage and recovers 3% stamina.
Active - Channel your inner beast to ignite an intensive cellular recovery, healing 15% of your maximum health over a brief 4-second window while generating 25 immediate Rage points. (90s CD)

Passive - Your internal fury burns hotter and longer, slowing your natural Rage decay by 30%. While maintaining high fury (above 50 Rage), you easily shake off crowd control, reducing all CC durations by 12%.

Active - Enter a state of pure, unyielding survival for 8 seconds. Instantly restore 20% of your maximum health bar, gain a 25% damage reduction shell, and store 50% of all incoming damage inside an internal kinetic reservoir. When the effect terminates, you safely diffuse this energy, converting 40% of the stored reservoir back into health over 5 seconds. If cast while in critical condition (sub-30% health), gain absolute crowd-control immunity for 3 seconds on activation. (200s CD)
Passive - Your brute force is unmatched; all heavy two-handed weapon strikes deal a flat 15% amplified damage.
Active - Swing your massive weapon in a wide, sweeping horizontal arc, dealing 130% weapon damage to up to 3 enemies caught in the path of the blade. (30s CD)
Passive - Your heavy swings carry immense cleave weight, causing 30% of your primary strike damage to bleed over and strike an adjacent enemy target automatically.

Passive - If an opponent parries or blocks your massive strike, your weapon's sheer weight crushes their momentum anyway: Your next active skill within 4 seconds deals 25% bonus damage and cannot be deflected or softened.

Active - Spin your massive weapon around your body in a violent cyclone, dealing 100% weapon damage to all surrounding enemies. Connecting with at least 2 targets generates 10 immediate Rage. (45s CD)

Passive - Slicing through multiple meat targets simultaneously fuels your leverage. Catching 2 or more targets in a single swing boosts your raw Strength stat by 8% for 6 seconds (stacks up to 2 times).
Active - Bring your weapon down in a terrifying execution swing for 180% weapon damage, physically sundering their armor plates to reduce their armor rating by 25% for 6 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Your blades naturally seek out compromised targets. Your Critical Hits against targets who are slowed, staggered, or bleeding inflict 20% amplified Critical Destruction damage.

Active - Heavily commit to smashing your weapon directly into the earth, sending a shockwave out in a massive frontal cone for 260% weapon damage. This shatters enemy posture into an extended hard Stagger and strips their armor by 20% for 8 seconds. Any target caught directly at the epicenter of the impact zone takes an additional 25% bonus damage. (200s CD)

classes.title: Jester Talents
classes.description: Slippery melee tricksters who win through feints, setup, evasive movement, and controlled chaos.

nodes.description: Passive - Your swift dagger pokes paint a glowing neon Mischief debuff onto the target for 4 seconds. Your next active class skill consumes this mark to trigger a theater effect.

Active - Execute a flashy, deceptive stab for 120% weapon damage. Consuming a Mischief mark with this skill applies Weakened, reducing the target's outgoing physical power by 10% for 4 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Striking an enemy who is currently wearing your Mischief paint rewards you with a 6% boost to Critical Chance for 4 seconds and flashes 4% stamina back into your active pool.

Passive - Master the performance rhythm. Perfectly alternating between a basic attack swing and an active skill injection awards a stacking 5% damage amplification buff (stacks up to 3 times, lasts 5 seconds).

Active - Execute 3 rapid theatrical dagger thrusts for 75% weapon damage per hit. If Mischief is active and consumed on the opening strike, the final strike hits for 25% amplified bonus damage. (45s CD)
Passive - Landing any active melee skill triggers an immediate dance response, boosting your movement speed by 10% and amplifying your active dodge frames by 10% for 2.5 seconds.

Active - Deliver a dramatic, over-the-top execution strike for 165% weapon damage. If your target is currently suffering from your Weakened or Slowed debuffs, your Critical Damage explodes by 20% for the next 6 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Targets who have had their Mischief marks actively consumed become highly vulnerable, taking 12% increased damage from all your basic weapon strikes for 4 seconds.

Active - Open the grand curtain for 8 seconds. Instantly cycles through three distinct theater buffs in perfect sequence: Comedian (+15% Critical Chance), Tragedian (+20% Physical Armor Penetration), and Fool (Instantly grants a 10% Stamina refund on basic weapon swings). Completing a full three-buff performance cycle within the 8-second window automatically resets the active cooldown of your Mocking Finish. (200s CD)
Passive - Performing a manual evade or vault over an opponent costs 15% less Stamina and extends your tracking distance by 1.5 yards.
Active - Leap directly over your target's head, slicing down into their spine for 110% weapon damage and landing seamlessly behind their back. (30s CD)
Passive - Successfully dodging an incoming melee attack instantly applies a 20% movement slow to the attacker for 3 seconds.
Passive - Standing or striking from a target's rear 180-degree blind spot boosts your base attack speed by 12%.
Active - Flip horizontally in a flash, dealing 120% weapon damage to all surrounding enemies and inducing a hard 1-second knockdown to targets caught on your flanks. (45s CD)
Passive - While actively executing a dash or flip, your character frame gains 20% evasion resistance against incoming area-of-effect sweeps.
Active - Run up your target's body, kicking off their chest to strike for 140% weapon damage, dealing a heavy 1.5-second Stun while propelling yourself 5 yards backward into safety. (90s CD)
Passive - Breaking an enemy's Guard via an [F] input instantly restores 1 charge of your movement abilities.

Active - For 8 seconds, your active movement speed climbs by 35% and dodging an attack leaves behind an interactive mirror image clone that mirrors your basic attacks for 40% damage effectiveness. (200s CD)
Passive - Your utility skills deal 15% extra Poise damage, causing target balance structures to degrade rapidly.
Active - Smite your target across the helmet with a heavy blunt strike for 90% damage, inducing a 2-second Silence state that blocks ability casting. (30s CD)
Passive - Executing an [F] kick or elbow strike has a 25% chance to obscure the target's vision, lowering their melee hit accuracy by 10% for 3 seconds.
Passive - Your melee abilities deal 15% amplified physical output when striking targets locked inside hard Stuns, Roots, or Staggers.
Active - Swipe low across the ankles with an iron hook hook-blade, dealing 100% damage and rooting up to three targets in a frontal cone line for 2 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Activating a utility trick forces all adjacent enemy AI entities to lose threat tracking on you for 2 seconds.
Active - Throw down an explosive smoke pellet at your feet, creating a thick 4-yard cloud for 4 seconds. Allies inside gain 30% evasion; enemies are heavily slowed. (90s CD)
Passive - When an opponent exhausts their block stability or stamina below 20%, your armor penetration scaling climbs by a flat 20%.
Active - For 8 seconds, your active attacks disorient targets. Every third basic hit triggers a complete Disarm state for 2 seconds, preventing them from using weapon-based skills. (200s CD)

classes.title: Samurai Talents
classes.description: Highly methodical blademasters who build execution focus, utilize precise parrying stances, and unleash devastating single-strike drawing cuts.

nodes.description: Passive - Entering combat grants a stacking Focus buff every 3 seconds. Each stack grants 4% Critical Chance (Max 5 stacks). Taking direct damage clears all stacks.
Active - Sheathe your blade and brace. Release a devastating forward drawing strike dealing 140% weapon damage. Releasing the key perfectly at the 1-second mark ensures a Critical Hit. (30s CD)
Passive - Slaying a target instantly restores 20% of your max Stamina and increases your movement speed by 15% for 4 seconds.
Passive - When your attacks are blocked or parried, your armor penetration value climbs by 15% for your next two strikes.
Active - Execute a spinning horizontal crescent slash for 110% weapon damage, painting a Bleed effect on all struck targets that ticks for 15% weapon damage over 5 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Chaining basic attacks smoothly into active sword arts increases the tracking range of your next dash or leap attack by 2 yards.
Active - An incredibly high-commitment overhead slash dealing 220% weapon damage. Bypasses 30% of the target's physical armor defenses. (90s CD)
Passive - While sitting at maximum Focus stacks, you become completely immune to minor interrupt and stagger effects during active ability windups.

Active - For 8 seconds, enter a transcendent focus state. Your Iaido Draw has its cooldown smashed to 2 seconds and can be executed while walking. Every Critical Hit scored during this window extends the duration by 1 second (Up to a maximum 4-second extension). (200s CD)
Passive - Your active lock-on target takes 8% increased physical damage from all your party members' melee strikes.
Active - Strike your target for 100% weapon damage, marking them with an Execution Target aura for 5 seconds. Party members who hit this target heal for 3% of their max health. (30s CD)
Passive - Allies standing within 6 yards of your position gain a 10% increase to their active Poise stability and block mitigation.
Passive - Swapping your active combat stance automatically clears any active movement slow or cripple effect currently dragging down your speed.
Active - Drive a samurai standard into the earth, granting all allies within an 8-yard radius a 15% physical damage bonus and a 15% reduction to active ability cooldowns for 6 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Successfully executing a Guard Break [F] instantly builds 1 full stack of tactical focus for you and all nearby group members.
Active - Enter a defensive, heavily anchored posture for 5 seconds. Your block stamina pool scales by 40% and you automatically parry the first three frontal incoming projectable attacks. (90s CD)
Passive - For every active negative status or debuff applied to your character, your base physical armor scales upward by 5% (Caps at 20%).

Active - Unleash a massive warlord aura for 8 seconds. All adjacent allies gain a 20% flat attack speed amplification and absolute slow immunity. Upon activation, a heavy shockwave rips out from your blade in a wide frontal arc, dealing 180% weapon damage and leaving all affected targets Staggered for 2 seconds. (200s CD)
Passive - Executing a manual sidestep or dodge gives your next basic attack within 3 seconds a 20% flat damage amplification bonus.
Active - Pierce forward like a flash, traveling 6 yards to strike a target for 115% weapon damage. If this strike lands cleanly from behind, it inflicts a 2-second Root. (30s CD)
Passive - Attacks directed at your flanks or back deal 10% less damage to you as your blade fluidly checks incoming trajectories.
Passive - Your basic attack animations scale 10% faster for every enemy within a 5-yard perimeter around you (Caps out at 30% attack speed).
Active - Leap into the air, spinning your blade to deal 130% weapon damage to all surrounding enemies, physically pulling them 2 yards closer to your center. (45s CD)
Passive - Successfully parrying an opponent leaves behind a phantom decoy image for 1.5 seconds, throwing off enemy target indicators.
Active - Dash forward like a blur through up to three targets in a straight line, dealing 160% weapon damage to each. Leaves all struck targets Silenced for 1.5 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - When your health drops below 35%, your movement speed permanently climbs by 15% and your Stamina costs drop by 20% until healed.

Active - For 6 seconds, your movement speed is amplified by 30%, your dash cooldowns are reduced to 0.5 seconds, and every basic swing emits a razor airwave that cleaves targets up to 6 yards away for 60% weapon damage. Leaves behind a visual wind trail showing your movement vector. (200s CD)

classes.title: Monk Talents
classes.description: Spiritual martial artists who utilize dual-fist martial arts, manipulate a flowing Qi resource bar, and alternate between elemental strikes and intense internal restoration loops.

nodes.description: Passive - Basic fist strikes generate 5 Qi points on impact. Expending 20 Qi points amplifies the raw physical damage of your next active kick skill by 15%.
Active - Issue a snap palm thrust forward dealing 110% weapon damage, instantly fueling your pool with 15 free Qi points on target contact. (30s CD)
Passive - While your Qi resource bar sits completely full above 80 points, your manual running and sprinting speeds climb by 10%.
Passive - Successfully executing a parry or side-step redirects spiritual energy, recovering 5% of your max Stamina pool.
Active - A heavy, concentrated double-palm strike dealing 130% weapon damage and inducing an immediate 1.5-second Stagger state on unshielded humanoids. (45s CD)
Passive - Chaining punches and kicks flawlessly together without repeating the exact same skill twice amplifies your overall attack velocity by 10%.
Active - Channel internal force and execute a flying kick across 6 yards, striking for 170% damage and smashing targets flat through their block stability. (90s CD)
Passive - When you are afflicted by a hard crowd-control disable, your system automatically expends 30 Qi to slash the remaining duration by 30%.

Active - Enter a legendary state of spiritual clarity for 8 seconds. Your active Qi generation is doubled, ability stamina invocation costs drop down to 0, and all fist strikes echo with a spiritual blast dealing 30% additional true armor-bypassing damage. (200s CD)
Passive - While standing completely still, your base physical armor rating climbs by 12% and you become totally immune to minor knockback vectors.
Active - Adopt an iron-clad guard stance for 4 seconds, creating a spiritual earthen shell around your flesh that mitigates 30% of all incoming blows. (30s CD)
Passive - Max health scales up by a clean 10%. 10% of all physical damage absorbed is shunted into your secondary shield balance bar.
Passive - When your active barriers or armor protections are shattered by an enemy Critical Hit, your skin hardens to block 15% damage for 4 seconds.
Active - Stomp your bare foot heavily into the soil, sending out a fracturing ring dealing 100% damage and slowing all surrounding units by 30% for 3 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Successfully blocking or absorbing structural hits filters the force downward, recovering 4% Stamina per impact.
Active - Lock your internal energy nodes for 5 seconds. You reflect 25% of incoming physical damage vectors and cannot be guard-broken via [F] inputs. (90s CD)
Passive - When your health reservoir drops below 35%, your crowd-control resistance rating automatically scales upward by a flat 25%.

Active - For 8 seconds, expand your structural presence. Gain 30% flat damage mitigation, absolute displacement immunity, and your fist strikes generate massive environmental threat while wrapping surrounding allies in a 15% armor shield. (200s CD)
Passive - Expending your Qi resources emits a soft 6-yard vapor cloud that restores 2% max health to your most heavily injured party member.
Active - Project a soft wave of internal energy forward in a 5-yard line, dealing 90% damage to foes while clearing slow effects from allies. (30s CD)
Passive - Executing a basic dash or side-slip leaves behind a minor trail of cleansing mist that shortens allied debuff durations by 10%.
Passive - Landing a Critical Hit with a martial strike causes a healing resonance, ticking for minor recovery across your entire party framework.

Active - Strike an ally gently or an enemy aggressively. If hitting an ally: Restores a clean block of health. If hitting an enemy: Deals 100% damage and transfers 50% of the value as life to a close ally. (45s CD)
Passive - Standing adjacent to your group members scales up your personal Qi generation rates by 15%.
Active - Wrap a target group member inside an intensive bubbling water shield for 5 seconds, completely absorbing incoming projectable threats. (90s CD)
Passive - While sitting safely above 50% max health, all your supportive restoration and healing output values scale up by a flat 15%.

Active - Channel an intensive spiritual geyser for 8 seconds. You project a massive 10-yard oasis ring on the ground. Group members standing inside are granted complete slow and root immunity, 20% incoming damage reduction, and continuous rapid health regeneration. (200s CD)

classes.title: Shield Hero Talents
classes.description: Incorruptible bastions who wield giant tower shields as tactical weapons, manipulating threat and baseline mechanics to lock down spaces.

nodes.description: Passive - Blocking attacks safely accumulates kinetic pressure inside your shield framework. Every block adds 5% damage weight to your next active bash (Max 5 stacks).
Active - Slam your shield horizontally, dealing 125% armor-scaled crushing physical damage and fracturing target defenses to strip 15% armor for 5 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Your manual sprint speeds scale up by 10% when moving directly toward an active lock-on target.
Passive - Successfully hitting an enemy with a manual Guard Break [F] instantly converts 100% of accumulated kinetic storage into bonus impact force.
Active - Smash your tower shield down vertically into the crust, sending out a line shockwave for 140% armor damage that roots all affected targets for 2 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Shield-scaled ability hits emit minor dirt-shattering vibration circles that deal 20% cleave damage to adjacent units.
Active - Sprint forward blindly behind your shield for 8 yards, running over and flattening all targets caught in your direct movement trajectory for 160% damage. (90s CD)
Passive - Your Critical Hits scored via shield bashing abilities deal 25% amplified impact force, inducing long-duration staggers on humanoids.

Active - Leap high into the sky and come crashing down with your tower shield at an designated location. Deals a massive 250% armor-scaled impact blow to all targets in a 6-yard radius, flinging them back and forcing their lock-on indicators to reset completely. (200s CD)
Passive - Your baseline threat generation is permanently scaled up by 25%. Basic strikes targeting you fill your shield balance bar rather than dealing chip damage.
Active - Plant your massive tower shield into the soil, creating a hard physical barrier line for 4 seconds that blockades enemy passage routes. (30s CD)
Passive - Performing a clean forward block blocks 10% additional physical damage and leaves the attacker staggered for 0.5 seconds.
Passive - Your max health pool is amplified by a flat 15%. Every parried melee impact shaves 1 second off the remaining active cooldown of your survival abilities.
Active - Ram your tower shield forward in a short 3-yard heavy bash, dealing 100% shield-scaled armor damage and knocking targets flat onto their backs. (45s CD)
Passive - All allies positioned directly inside a 4-yard semi-circle behind your tower shield gain 20% armor amplification.
Active - Cast a heavy spiritual chain onto a target ally for 6 seconds. Redirects 30% of all damage they absorb straight to your shield armor pool. (90s CD)
Passive - Dropping below 40% health instantly cleanses all active root, slow, and cripple effects from your character (15s internal cooldown).

Active - For 8 seconds, convert your tower shield into a massive shining barrier dome. All incoming projectable attacks are instantly absorbed, block stamina drain drops to 0, and allies standing inside the circle gain a shield barrier equal to 20% of your maximum health. (200s CD)
Passive - Your presence radiates a warm 8-yard field, providing all standing group members with a flat 10% healing received amplification.
Active - Release a blinding flash from your mirror-polished shield surface, dealing 90% elemental damage and blinding all frontal targets for 2 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Chaining a basic sword or shield swipe provides a 5% chance to instantly shave 2 seconds off an ally's current negative debuff timers.
Passive - Successfully executing a shield block converts the deflected friction into holy light, restoring 1% max health to your most wounded party member.
Active - Sanctify an 8-yard circle on the ground for 6 seconds. Allies standing inside regenerate 3% health per second and enjoy a 15% reduction to ability stamina costs. (45s CD)
Passive - Activating an aura support command grants your movement speed a clean 10% boost for 3 seconds.
Active - Envelop a target ally in an intensive sun barrier for 5 seconds, absorbing a fixed baseline of damage and increasing their movement speed by 20%. (90s CD)
Passive - While you stand inside your own consecrated circles, your baseline physical armor values scale upward by a flat 15%.

Active - Channel an intensive pillar of holy radiant light for 8 seconds. Your movement speed is slowed by 20%, but all party members standing within 10 yards are granted absolute crowd-control immunity, 20% flat damage mitigation, and continuous health replenishment tracking with your total defense ratings. (200s CD)
